message:
🐛 Clean up resize drag listeners on unmount in SidebarShell + MissionSidebar (#10862)

Both sidebars attach mousemove/mouseup to document during drag resize.
If the component unmounts mid-drag (e.g. navigation), mouseup never
fires and listeners leak — firing on every subsequent mouse move.

Fix: store the cleanup function in a ref and invoke it from a useEffect
cleanup callback on unmount.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
